overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime exploration around the Maze Bank Arena (with 'Panic' signage). The player walks along the arena exterior, ascends stairs to the main entrance, then exits toward the street, passing billboards and observing light traffic before walking along an elevated road overlooking the Los Santos canal. The scene features wet pavement reflecting streetlights and a moody urban atmosphere.

scene_state.functional_zone: arena exterior walkway with benches and landscaping

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete pathway beside the arena, passing empty benches and palm trees

entered.detail: large concrete stadium structure with illuminated facade
row of empty concrete park benches along the walkway
tall palm trees silhouetted against the night sky
tall street lamps casting yellow light on the wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a quiet night outside the arena, with the camera walking along a concrete pathway lined with benches and palm trees. The arena building looms on the right, illuminated by exterior lights, while streetlights reflect off the wet pavement.

scene_state.functional_zone: outdoor staircase leading to arena entrance plaza

events.description: begins ascending wide concrete stairs toward the main arena entrance

agents.ego_description: walking up the concrete stairs flanked by hedges and walls toward the arena entrance

entered.detail: wide flight of concrete stairs leading upward to the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a wide outdoor staircase between landscaped walls, moving from the side walkway toward the main arena entrance. The building facade becomes more prominent ahead as the benches fall behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: arena entrance plaza with illuminated facade

events.description: reaches top of stairs entering open plaza with direct view of arena entrance
turns right to walk along the front facade of the arena

agents.ego_description: approaching the main entrance to view the illuminated Panic sign, then turning to walk along the building front

entered.detail: large circular illuminated sign with 'PANIC' text and basketball logo
row of tall arched entryways with bright interior lighting
open paved area in front of the arena entrance

segments.scene_description: Emerging into the open plaza, the camera reveals the grand arena entrance dominated by the large circular 'Panic' sign glowing purple and gold. The player walks along the facade, passing the illuminated arched doorways before turning to exit the plaza area.

scene_state.functional_zone: pathway leading from arena to urban street with billboards

events.description: exits immediate arena vicinity approaching street with illuminated billboards

agents.ego_description: walking away from the arena down steps toward the street, passing landscaping and approaching billboards

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying 'FAME OR SHAME AUDITIONS' in orange text
tall digital screen showing pink and white advertisement
distant downtown skyscrapers with illuminated windows

segments.scene_description: Leaving the arena behind, the camera descends toward the street where large digital billboards become visible. The 'Fame or Shame' audition sign dominates the view as the arena recedes to the left, and the distant city skyline appears ahead.

events.description: motorcyclist in blue jacket rides past on the street
approaches intersection with red traffic lights visible

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk near the intersection, observing passing traffic including a motorcyclist

notable_agents.action: motorcyclist wearing blue jacket riding past the intersection

entered.detail: overhead traffic signal showing red lights
multi-lane city street with wet reflective surface

segments.scene_description: The scene shifts to a street intersection with active traffic. A motorcyclist passes by as the camera walks along the road, with red traffic lights visible ahead. The arena and billboards fall behind as the urban streetscape dominates the view.

events.description: view opens to reveal deep concrete canal below the road with city lights in distance

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated road looking out over the canal toward the downtown skyline

entered.detail: deep concrete drainage channel running parallel to the road below street level
metal safety barrier along the edge of the elevated roadway

segments.scene_description: Walking along an elevated roadway, the camera reveals a sweeping view of the concrete canal below and the illuminated downtown skyline in the distance. The guardrail lines the right side as the urban landscape stretches out ahead, with the road continuing toward the city center.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the secluded perimeter of the Maze Bank Arena into the expansive, neon-lit urban landscape of Los Santos. It begins on a quiet concrete pathway lined with palm trees and wet pavement, moving steadily toward the arena building before ascending a wide outdoor staircase. As the camera emerges into the open plaza, the view is dominated by the glowing purple and gold Panic sign and illuminated arched doorways, which then recede as the camera descends toward the street. The scene shifts from the arena's architecture to a bustling intersection filled with digital billboards and passing traffic, with the Fame or Shame sign marking the transition into the wider city. Finally, the camera moves onto an elevated roadway, where the view opens up to reveal a concrete canal below and the shimmering downtown skyline stretching out in the distance.
